{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144245D99B3DBA8D64BB2F1D5A"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7565566323843547929","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"“我叫陈林，当你看到这段话的时候，我已经重生了……”"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761499908,"group_id":"7527300369290890264","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这一生可知的也不过这一世，若不砥砺前行又未免无趣，与诸君共勉","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0EGpGTjaY6WGipwVFZ+UKQAqS6SIFCHc0c8TfzJFk2K","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7c60ace2edc04c36b86e0e9c644ea346~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797135&x-signature=YspIx4XnRKD0KGXe9pQvoUttZFw%3D","user_id":"3769590804129992","user_name":"小生何言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3769590804129992","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7527300369290890264","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生复仇】【杀伐果断】【无敌爽文】【无女主】【无系统】
灾变降临，开启全球异能时代。
上一世陈林觉醒吞噬异能，一路顺风顺水，十年成就A级，到头来却发现这不过是陆氏财团的圈套。
重生归来，没有花里胡哨的系统，没有拖泥带水的感情，只有吞噬万法的异能，让万千异能为我所用。
修为？吞噬就能增加。
天赋？吞噬就能提升。
瓶颈？不好意思，我吞噬异能没有瓶颈。
前世的仇敌，要剁碎了喂异兽。
挡路的联盟，会掀翻他们的老巢。
那些高高在上的异能强者，终将在他脚下颤抖。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d5957d917c62ac27a29eceeeb165220","author":"小生何言","author_id":"","book_id":"7527300369290890264","book_name":"全球异能：从重生开始！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7527300591404450328","read_count":"711","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"400895"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"213","tags":"都市高武,都市,重生,求生,无敌,无女主,末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4c520d9f1f1eda05f5ffa0f581922981~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432165&x-signature=WwVIWLlsXAjB2QlMypeUwtL5P5g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3769590804129992","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"353"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144245D99B3DBA8D64BB2F1D5A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_cou
